compute_basis: Estimated (6ND, dense): paper states the series trained from scratch on 2T tokens; 6 x 33e9 x 2.0e12 = 4.0e23. Tokens are official; FLOP is our 6ND estimate.
notes: DeepSeek's first public model (GitHub release 2023-11-02; arXiv tech report 2024-01-25). Dense 33B, 2T tokens (87% code / 13% NL). Not in Epoch inventory.

compute_basis: Estimated (6ND, dense): paper reports 67B dense params trained on 2.0T tokens; 6 x 67e9 x 2.0e12 = 8.04e23. Matches our internal DeepSeek pre-training trajectory anchor.
notes: DeepSeek's first general-purpose LLM (dense 7B/67B). Tokens official; 6ND our estimate. Corroborated by internal trajectory script (make_training_compute_fig.py). Not in Epoch inventory.

compute_basis: Estimated (6ND, continued pre-train only): initialized from DeepSeek-Coder-v1.5 7B, continually trained on 500B tokens; 6 x 7e9 x 500e9 = 2.1e22. Counts only the math continued-pretrain stage, not the inherited base.
notes: GRPO paper model. 500B-token continued pre-train (120B math + code/web/arXiv mix). FLOP excludes the base-model compute it was initialized from. Not in Epoch inventory.

compute_basis: Estimated (6ND, MoE active params): 15.7B total / 2.4B activated, trained from scratch on 5.7T tokens (HF model card); 6 x 2.4e9 x 5.7e12 = 8.2e22.
notes: Small MoE companion to DeepSeek-V2 (2 shared + 64 routed experts, 6 active). Token count from HF card; FLOP our 6ND-active estimate. Not in Epoch inventory.

compute_basis: Estimated (6ND, MoE active + assumed VL token budget): 27B total / 4.5B activated. VL training-token count not disclosed; assume ~0.8T vision-language tokens (typical for a DeepSeekMoE-based VLM fine-tune); 6 x 4.5e9 x 0.8e12 = 2.2e22.
notes: MoE vision-language model on DeepSeekMoE + MoonViT-style encoder. Token budget is OUR assumption (not disclosed) -> low confidence. Not in Epoch inventory.

compute_basis: Estimated (6ND, MoE active, base + extension): V3 base (37B active x 14.8T = 3.29e24) plus DeepSeek's disclosed ~840B-token long-context/continued-pretrain extension (6 x 37e9 x 0.84e12 = 1.9e23); total ~3.5e24, rounded to 3.7e24 to include the V3.1 hybrid-reasoning extension.
notes: Hybrid (think/non-think) update on the V3 base; 671B total / 37B active. Most compute is inherited V3 pre-training. Epoch lists 'DeepSeek-V3 (Mar 2025)' but not V3.1 specifically.

compute_basis: Estimated: continued-pretrain/sparse-attention experiment on the V3.1 base; adds a modest continued-pretrain budget on top of V3.1 (~3.7e24). Marginal new compute small; total dominated by inherited V3 pre-training.
notes: DeepSeek Sparse Attention experimental release (V3.2 official 2025-12-01). 671B/37B-active MoE. FLOP near-identical to V3.1; new compute is incremental. Not separately in Epoch inventory.

compute_basis: Estimated (6ND, MoE active): 16B total / 2.8B activated, trained on 5.7T tokens with the Muon optimizer (HF card + Muon scaling paper); 6 x 2.8e9 x 5.7e12 = 9.6e22.
notes: Moonshot's open MoE base used as the LLM backbone for Kimi-VL. Tokens official; FLOP our 6ND-active estimate. Not in Epoch inventory.

compute_basis: Estimated (6ND, MoE active, base + VL): Moonlight 16B/2.8B-active base (5.7T tokens -> 9.6e22) plus a vision-language joint-training stage. Report describes multi-stage VL pre-training; assume ~1.4T additional multimodal tokens at 2.8B active (6 x 2.8e9 x 1.4e12 = 2.4e22). Total ~1.2e23.
notes: 2.8B-active MoE LLM (Moonlight) + 400M MoonViT encoder. VL-stage token budget is OUR assumption -> low confidence. Not in Epoch inventory (Epoch has Kimi k1.5 / K2, not Kimi-VL).

compute_basis: Estimated (6ND, dense): ChatGLM/GLM-4 tech report states GLM-4-9B pre-trained on ~10T tokens; 6 x 9e9 x 10e12 = 5.4e23.
notes: Open 9B from the GLM-4 family (released alongside the GLM-4 API models). 10T tokens official; FLOP our 6ND estimate. Epoch lists GLM-4 (0520) and GLM-4-Plus but not the open 9B.

compute_basis: Estimated (6ND, dense): GLM-4-0414 release reports ~15T-token pre-training corpus for the 32B base; 6 x 32e9 x 15e12 = 2.88e24.
notes: Base for the GLM-Z1 reasoning family. 15T-token figure from the 0414 release notes (not a peer-reviewed report) -> moderate confidence. GLM-Z1-32B reasoning variant is a post-train on this base. Not in Epoch inventory.

compute_basis: Estimated (diffusion-transformer, NOT 6ND): no token count applies. Order-of-magnitude from comparable 5B video DiTs trained ~1e5 GPU-hours on H100 (~1e15 FLOP/s effective, ~30% MFU): ~1e5 x 3600 x 1e15 x 0.3 ~= 1e23 upper bound; we use 1e22 as a conservative central given the modest 720x480 resolution and limited compute reported.
notes: Text-to-video diffusion model (3D-VAE + Expert Transformer). FLOP is a very rough order-of-magnitude (no GPU-hours or token count disclosed) -> low confidence. Not in Epoch inventory.

compute_basis: Estimated (6ND, dense): tech report states the 1.8B/7B/20B models pre-trained on 2.0-2.6T tokens; using 2.6T for the 20B: 6 x 20e9 x 2.6e12 = 3.12e23.
notes: Shanghai AI Lab / SenseTime flagship open dense model. Token range official (2.0-2.6T); FLOP our 6ND estimate using upper bound. Epoch lists 'InternLM' (v1) only.

compute_basis: Estimated (6ND, dense): same report, ~2.6T tokens; 6 x 7e9 x 2.6e12 = 1.09e23.
notes: 7B sibling of InternLM2-20B. Token count official; FLOP our estimate. Not in Epoch inventory.

compute_basis: No defensible training-compute estimate: InternVL2.5-78B composes a 6B InternViT vision encoder with a ~72B Qwen2.5 LLM backbone (not trained from scratch by OpenGVLab); the multimodal alignment/SFT token budget is undisclosed and the LLM compute belongs to Alibaba's Qwen2.5-72B. Left null to avoid double-counting.
notes: First open MLLM >70% on MMMU. Compute null on purpose (backbone is Qwen2.5-72B; alignment tokens undisclosed). Included for inventory completeness. Not in Epoch inventory.

compute_basis: Estimated (6ND, continued pre-train only): 01.AI states Yi-1.5 is continually pre-trained on the Yi base with a 500B-token high-quality corpus; 6 x 34e9 x 500e9 = 1.02e23. Counts only the 1.5 continued-pretrain stage (the ~3.1T-token Yi base is the separately-listed Yi-34B).
notes: Conflicting figures exist (500B continued vs 3.1T from-scratch); we treat it as a 500B continued-pretrain on the existing Yi-34B base (Epoch already lists Yi-34B). FLOP excludes inherited base. Moderate confidence.

compute_basis: Estimated (6ND, dense): MiniCPM tech report reports ~1.06T tokens of stable+decay pre-training for the 2.4B model; 6 x 2.4e9 x 1.06e12 = 1.53e22.
notes: Tsinghua/OpenBMB small-LM with WSD scheduler. Tokens official; FLOP our 6ND estimate. Release Feb 2024 (day uncertain -> YYYY-MM-01). Not in Epoch inventory.

compute_basis: Estimated (6ND, dense): MiMo-7B-Base trained from scratch on 25T tokens (tech report); 6 x 7e9 x 25e12 = 1.05e24.
notes: Xiaomi's first open reasoning LLM; unusually high 25T-token budget for a 7B dense model. Tokens official; FLOP our 6ND estimate (MTP objective ignored for the estimate). Epoch lists later MiMo-V2 variants, not MiMo-7B.

compute_basis: Estimated (6ND, MoE active): 290B total / 28.8B activated, pre-trained on 9T tokens ('Every FLOP Counts' report); 6 x 28.8e9 x 9e12 = 1.56e24.
notes: Ant's large MoE trained partly on domestic (non-NVIDIA) GPUs. Params and 9T tokens official; FLOP our 6ND-active estimate. Not in Epoch inventory (Epoch lists Ling-1T).

compute_basis: Estimated (6ND, MoE active): 16.8B total / 2.75B activated; the report co-trains Lite and Plus on the same corpus, so assume ~9T tokens; 6 x 2.75e9 x 9e12 = 1.49e23.
notes: Smaller Bailing MoE. Active params official; token count assumed equal to Ling-Plus (9T) -> moderate confidence. Not in Epoch inventory.
